post_apollo_people_match.heading_zh: 匹配并丰富单个联系人 post_apollo_people_match
post_apollo_people_match.desc_en: Enrich a single person with Apollo's contact and company data; optionally trigger waterfall email/phone enrichment and reveal personal emails or phone numbers. Provide as many identifying parameters (name, email, domain, LinkedIn URL, Apollo id) as possible to improve match accuracy.
post_apollo_people_match.description_zh: 用 Apollo 的联系人与公司数据丰富单个人；可选触发邮箱/电话瀑布式补全，并解锁个人邮箱或电话号码。尽量多提供标识参数（姓名、邮箱、域名、LinkedIn 链接、Apollo id）以提升匹配准确率。

post_apollo_people_bulk_match.heading_zh: 批量匹配并丰富联系人 post_apollo_people_bulk_match
post_apollo_people_bulk_match.desc_en: Enrich up to 10 people in one call by passing an array of person records. Returns per-record match results plus aggregate counts of how many records were enriched and how many credits were spent.
post_apollo_people_bulk_match.description_zh: 一次调用最多丰富 10 个人，传入人员记录数组。返回每条记录的匹配结果，以及成功丰富数量、消耗额度等汇总计数。

get_apollo_organizations_enrich.heading_zh: 丰富单个公司信息 get_apollo_organizations_enrich
get_apollo_organizations_enrich.desc_en: Enrich a single company by its web domain, returning Apollo's full organization profile.
get_apollo_organizations_enrich.description_zh: 按公司主域名丰富单个公司，返回 Apollo 完整的公司画像。

post_apollo_organizations_bulk_enrich.heading_zh: 批量丰富公司信息 post_apollo_organizations_bulk_enrich
post_apollo_organizations_bulk_enrich.desc_en: Enrich up to 10 companies in one call by passing multiple domains. Returns matched organization profiles plus counts of requested, unique, enriched, and missing records.
post_apollo_organizations_bulk_enrich.description_zh: 一次调用最多丰富 10 个公司，传入多个域名。返回匹配到的公司画像，以及请求数、去重数、丰富数、未命中数等计数。

post_apollo_mixed_people_api_search.desc_en: Find net-new people in the Apollo database using filters such as job title, seniority, location, employer attributes, and technologies used. Results are paginated; combine filters to narrow the audience.
post_apollo_mixed_people_api_search.description_zh: 用职位、资历、地区、雇主属性、所用技术等筛选条件在 Apollo 库中查找全新人员。结果分页；组合多个筛选可缩小目标人群。

post_apollo_mixed_companies_search.desc_en: Find companies in the Apollo database using filters such as domain, headcount range, location, revenue, funding, technologies, and active job postings. Results are paginated.
post_apollo_mixed_companies_search.description_zh: 用域名、人数区间、地区、营收、融资、技术栈、在招职位等筛选条件在 Apollo 库中查找公司。结果分页。

get_apollo_organizations_organization_id.desc_en: Retrieve the current active job postings for a given organization, useful for identifying hiring signals and growth areas.
get_apollo_organizations_organization_id.description_zh: 获取指定公司当前在招的职位，可用于识别招聘信号与增长方向。

get_apollo_organizations_id.heading_zh: 查询公司完整信息 get_apollo_organizations_id
get_apollo_organizations_id.desc_en: Retrieve the complete profile of an organization by its Apollo id.
get_apollo_organizations_id.description_zh: 按 Apollo id 获取公司的完整画像。

post_apollo_news_articles_search.desc_en: Find news articles tied to companies in the Apollo database, optionally filtered by organization, category, and publish-date window. Results are paginated.
post_apollo_news_articles_search.description_zh: 查找与 Apollo 库中公司关联的新闻，可按公司、类别、发布时间窗口筛选。结果分页。

post_apollo_accounts.desc_en: Create a new account (a company saved in your team's CRM). Duplicate domains are rejected. Requires a master API key.
post_apollo_accounts.description_zh: 创建账户（保存在团队 CRM 中的公司）。域名重复会被拒绝。需主 API key。

patch_apollo_accounts_account_id.desc_en: Update fields on an existing account identified by account_id. Only the fields you send are changed. Requires a master API key.
patch_apollo_accounts_account_id.description_zh: 按 account_id 更新已有账户的字段，仅修改你传入的字段。需主 API key。

post_apollo_accounts_bulk_create.desc_en: Create multiple accounts in one call. The response separates records newly created from those that already existed. Requires a master API key.
post_apollo_accounts_bulk_create.description_zh: 一次创建多个账户。响应把新建记录与已存在记录分开返回。需主 API key。

post_apollo_accounts_bulk_update.desc_en: Update multiple accounts in one call by pairing account_ids with the attributes to change. Supports asynchronous processing. Requires a master API key.
post_apollo_accounts_bulk_update.description_zh: 一次更新多个账户，将 account_ids 与要修改的属性配对。支持异步处理。需主 API key。

post_apollo_accounts_search.desc_en: Search your team's accounts by name, stage, and label, with sorting and pagination. Requires a master API key.
post_apollo_accounts_search.description_zh: 按名称、阶段、标签搜索团队账户，支持排序与分页。需主 API key。

get_apollo_accounts_id.desc_en: Retrieve a single account by its id. Requires a master API key.
get_apollo_accounts_id.description_zh: 按 id 获取单个账户。需主 API key。

post_apollo_accounts_update_owners.heading_zh: 批量更新账户负责人 post_apollo_accounts_update_owners
post_apollo_accounts_update_owners.desc_en: Reassign the owner of multiple accounts at once. Requires a master API key.
post_apollo_accounts_update_owners.description_zh: 一次为多个账户重新指派负责人。需主 API key。

get_apollo_account_stages.desc_en: List all account stages configured for your team. Use the returned ids to set or filter account_stage_id elsewhere. Requires a master API key.
get_apollo_account_stages.description_zh: 列出团队配置的所有账户阶段。返回的 id 可在别处用于设置或筛选 account_stage_id。需主 API key。

post_apollo_contacts.desc_en: Create a new contact (a person saved in your team's CRM). Requires a master API key.
post_apollo_contacts.description_zh: 创建联系人（保存在团队 CRM 中的人）。需主 API key。

get_apollo_contacts_contact_id.desc_en: Retrieve a single contact by its id. Requires a master API key.
get_apollo_contacts_contact_id.description_zh: 按 id 获取单个联系人。需主 API key。

patch_apollo_contacts_contact_id.desc_en: Update fields on an existing contact identified by contact_id. Only the fields you send are changed. Requires a master API key.
patch_apollo_contacts_contact_id.description_zh: 按 contact_id 更新已有联系人的字段，仅修改你传入的字段。需主 API key。

post_apollo_contacts_bulk_create.desc_en: Create multiple contacts in one call. The response separates records newly created from those that already existed. Requires a master API key.
post_apollo_contacts_bulk_create.description_zh: 一次创建多个联系人。响应把新建记录与已存在记录分开返回。需主 API key。

post_apollo_contacts_bulk_update.desc_en: Update multiple contacts in one call. Requires a master API key.
post_apollo_contacts_bulk_update.description_zh: 一次更新多个联系人。需主 API key。

post_apollo_contacts_search.desc_en: Search your team's contacts by keyword, stage, and label, with sorting and pagination. Requires a master API key.
post_apollo_contacts_search.description_zh: 按关键词、阶段、标签搜索团队联系人，支持排序与分页。需主 API key。

post_apollo_contacts_update_stages.heading_zh: 批量更新联系人阶段 post_apollo_contacts_update_stages
post_apollo_contacts_update_stages.desc_en: Move multiple contacts to a single contact stage at once. Requires a master API key.
post_apollo_contacts_update_stages.description_zh: 一次把多个联系人移动到同一个联系人阶段。需主 API key。

post_apollo_contacts_update_owners.heading_zh: 批量更新联系人负责人 post_apollo_contacts_update_owners
post_apollo_contacts_update_owners.desc_en: Reassign the owner of multiple contacts at once. Requires a master API key.
post_apollo_contacts_update_owners.description_zh: 一次为多个联系人重新指派负责人。需主 API key。

get_apollo_contact_stages.desc_en: List all contact stages configured for your team. Use the returned ids to set or filter contact_stage_id elsewhere. Requires a master API key.
get_apollo_contact_stages.description_zh: 列出团队配置的所有联系人阶段。返回的 id 可在别处用于设置或筛选 contact_stage_id。需主 API key。

post_apollo_opportunities.desc_en: Create a deal (opportunity) tied to an account. Requires a master API key.
post_apollo_opportunities.description_zh: 创建商机（deal），并关联到某个账户。需主 API key。

get_apollo_opportunities_search.desc_en: List all deals (opportunities), with sorting and pagination. Requires a master API key.
get_apollo_opportunities_search.description_zh: 列出全部商机，支持排序与分页。需主 API key。

get_apollo_opportunities_opportunity_id.desc_en: Retrieve a single deal (opportunity) by its id. Requires a master API key.
get_apollo_opportunities_opportunity_id.description_zh: 按 id 获取单个商机。需主 API key。

patch_apollo_opportunities_opportunity_i.desc_en: Update fields on an existing deal (opportunity). Only the fields you send are changed. Requires a master API key.
patch_apollo_opportunities_opportunity_i.description_zh: 更新已有商机的字段，仅修改你传入的字段。需主 API key。

get_apollo_opportunity_stages.desc_en: List all deal stages (opportunity stages) configured for your team. Use the returned ids to set or filter opportunity_stage_id elsewhere. Requires a master API key.
get_apollo_opportunity_stages.description_zh: 列出团队配置的所有商机阶段。返回的 id 可在别处用于设置或筛选 opportunity_stage_id。需主 API key。

post_apollo_emailer_campaigns_search.desc_en: Search the sequences (emailer campaigns) in your Apollo account by name, with pagination. Requires a master API key.
post_apollo_emailer_campaigns_search.description_zh: 按名称搜索 Apollo 账号中的序列（外联活动），支持分页。需主 API key。

post_apollo_emailer_campaigns_sequence_i.desc_en: Add contacts to a sequence by contact ids and/or label names. Several flags let you override safety checks (e.g. allow contacts without email or already active in other sequences). Requires a master API key.
post_apollo_emailer_campaigns_sequence_i.description_zh: 通过联系人 id 和/或标签名把联系人加入序列。多个开关可覆盖安全校验（如允许无邮箱、或已在其他序列中活跃的联系人）。需主 API key。

post_apollo_emailer_campaigns_remove_or_.heading_zh: 更新联系人在序列中的状态 post_apollo_emailer_campaigns_remove_or_stop_contact_ids
post_apollo_emailer_campaigns_remove_or_.desc_en: Remove or stop contacts in one or more sequences. The mode parameter selects whether to mark as finished, remove, or stop the contacts. Requires a master API key.
post_apollo_emailer_campaigns_remove_or_.description_zh: 在一个或多个序列中移除或停止联系人。mode 参数决定是标记完成、移除还是停止。需主 API key。

post_apollo_emailer_campaigns_sequence_i.desc_en: Activate a sequence so it starts sending. Requires a master API key.
post_apollo_emailer_campaigns_sequence_i.description_zh: 激活序列，使其开始发送。需主 API key。

post_apollo_emailer_campaigns_sequence_i.desc_en: Deactivate a sequence so it stops sending. Requires a master API key.
post_apollo_emailer_campaigns_sequence_i.description_zh: 停用序列，使其停止发送。需主 API key。

post_apollo_emailer_campaigns_sequence_i.desc_en: Archive a sequence: marks it inactive and finishes its contacts. Requires a master API key.
post_apollo_emailer_campaigns_sequence_i.description_zh: 归档序列：将其标记为非活跃并结束其中的联系人。需主 API key。

get_apollo_emailer_messages_search.desc_en: Search outreach emails, filtered by message stats, reply class, user, email account, and sequence. Results are paginated. Requires a master API key.
get_apollo_emailer_messages_search.description_zh: 搜索外联邮件，可按邮件统计、回复分类、用户、邮箱账户、序列筛选。结果分页。需主 API key。

get_apollo_emailer_messages_id_activitie.desc_en: Retrieve the activity log (opens, clicks, replies, etc.) for one outreach email. Requires a master API key.
get_apollo_emailer_messages_id_activitie.description_zh: 获取单封外联邮件的活动记录（打开、点击、回复等）。需主 API key。

post_apollo_tasks.desc_en: Create a single task assigned to a user and linked to a contact. Requires a master API key.
post_apollo_tasks.description_zh: 创建单个任务，指派给某用户并关联到联系人。需主 API key。

post_apollo_tasks_bulk_create.desc_en: Create one task for each of multiple contacts in a single call. Requires a master API key.
post_apollo_tasks_bulk_create.description_zh: 一次为多个联系人各创建一个任务。需主 API key。

post_apollo_tasks_search.desc_en: Search tasks with sorting and pagination. Requires a master API key.
post_apollo_tasks_search.description_zh: 搜索任务，支持排序与分页。需主 API key。

post_apollo_reports_sync_report.desc_en: Run an analytics report synchronously, specifying metrics, grouping dimensions, sorts, filters, and a date range. Requires a master API key.
post_apollo_reports_sync_report.description_zh: 同步查询分析报表，指定指标、分组维度、排序、筛选和时间范围。需主 API key。

post_apollo_phone_calls.desc_en: Log one or more phone-call records against a contact and account. Requires a master API key.
post_apollo_phone_calls.description_zh: 为联系人与账户登记一条或多条通话记录。需主 API key。

get_apollo_phone_calls_search.desc_en: Search call records by date range, duration, direction, user, label, purpose, outcome, and keyword. Results are paginated. Requires a master API key.
get_apollo_phone_calls_search.description_zh: 按时间范围、时长、呼叫方向、用户、标签、目的、结果、关键词搜索通话记录。结果分页。需主 API key。

put_apollo_phone_calls_id.desc_en: Update an existing call record identified by id. Requires a master API key.
put_apollo_phone_calls_id.description_zh: 按 id 更新已有的通话记录。需主 API key。

post_apollo_usage_stats_api_usage_stats.heading_zh: 查询 API 用量与限流 post_apollo_usage_stats_api_usage_stats
post_apollo_usage_stats_api_usage_stats.desc_en: Retrieve your API usage statistics and current rate-limit status. Requires a master API key.
post_apollo_usage_stats_api_usage_stats.description_zh: 获取你的 API 用量统计和当前限流状态。需主 API key。

get_apollo_users_search.desc_en: Get a paginated list of users on your team. Use the returned ids to populate owner_id / user_id elsewhere. Requires a master API key.
get_apollo_users_search.description_zh: 分页获取团队用户列表。返回的 id 可用于在别处填写 owner_id / user_id。需主 API key。

get_apollo_email_accounts.desc_en: Get the list of email accounts connected for sending. Use the returned ids as send_email_from_email_account_id. Requires a master API key.
get_apollo_email_accounts.description_zh: 获取已连接用于发信的邮箱账户列表。返回的 id 可作为 send_email_from_email_account_id。需主 API key。

get_apollo_labels.desc_en: Get a list of all lists (labels) in your account. Requires a master API key.
get_apollo_labels.description_zh: 获取账号中所有列表（标签）。需主 API key。

get_apollo_typed_custom_fields.desc_en: Get all typed custom fields defined for your team. Requires a master API key.
get_apollo_typed_custom_fields.description_zh: 获取团队定义的所有带类型自定义字段。需主 API key。

get_apollo_fields.desc_en: Get the list of fields available on your team's records. Requires a master API key.
get_apollo_fields.description_zh: 获取团队记录上可用的字段列表。需主 API key。

post_apollo_fields.desc_en: Create a custom field on a given entity modality (e.g. contact). Requires a master API key.
post_apollo_fields.description_zh: 在指定实体类型（如 contact）上创建自定义字段。需主 API key。

get_apollo_notes.desc_en: Get a list of notes, optionally filtered by the record they are attached to (contact, account, opportunity, calendar event, conversation). Requires a master API key.
get_apollo_notes.description_zh: 获取备注列表，可按所附记录（联系人、账户、商机、日历事件、会话）筛选。需主 API key。

first_name.desc_en: Person's first name; pair with last_name to identify by full name when no email or id is available.
first_name.title_zh: 人的名字；在没有邮箱或 id 时与 last_name 搭配按全名匹配。

last_name.desc_en: Person's last name; pair with first_name.
last_name.title_zh: 人的姓氏；与 first_name 搭配使用。

name.desc_en: Full name as an alternative to sending first_name and last_name separately.
name.title_zh: 全名，可替代分别传 first_name 与 last_name。

email.desc_en: Person's email address; the strongest single signal for an accurate match.
email.title_zh: 人的邮箱地址；单一最强的精确匹配信号。

hashed_email.desc_en: Hashed email used to match without sending the plaintext address.
hashed_email.title_zh: 邮箱哈希值，用于在不传明文邮箱的情况下匹配。
hashed_email.annotation: 源码未声明 MD5 与 SHA-256 之外的取值，详细哈希规范待研发确认。

organization_name.desc_en: Name of the person's employer (current or past), used to disambiguate matches.
organization_name.title_zh: 人的雇主名称（现任或曾任），用于区分匹配。

domain.desc_en: Web domain of the person's employer (current or past), used to disambiguate matches.
domain.title_zh: 人的雇主主域名（现任或曾任），用于区分匹配。

id.title_zh: 该人员的 Apollo 标识。

linkedin_url.desc_en: URL of the person's LinkedIn profile; a strong matching signal.
linkedin_url.title_zh: 人的 LinkedIn 主页链接；很强的匹配信号。

run_waterfall_email.desc_en: Enable waterfall email enrichment, which queries additional data sources to find an email.
run_waterfall_email.title_zh: 启用邮箱瀑布式补全，调用更多数据源来寻找邮箱。

run_waterfall_phone.desc_en: Enable waterfall phone enrichment, which queries additional data sources to find a phone number.
run_waterfall_phone.title_zh: 启用电话瀑布式补全，调用更多数据源来寻找电话。

reveal_personal_emails.desc_en: Include the person's personal emails in the result; may consume extra credits.
reveal_personal_emails.title_zh: 在结果中包含个人邮箱；可能额外消耗额度。

reveal_phone_number.desc_en: Include all available phone numbers in the result; when enabled, webhook_url becomes required because numbers are delivered asynchronously.
reveal_phone_number.title_zh: 在结果中包含所有可用电话；启用后 webhook_url 变为必填，因为号码异步回传。

webhook_url.desc_en: Callback URL that receives revealed phone numbers asynchronously; required when reveal_phone_number is enabled.
webhook_url.title_zh: 异步接收已揭示电话号码的回调地址；reveal_phone_number 启用时必填。

person.desc_en: Enriched profile of the matched person.
person.title_zh: 匹配到的人员的丰富后画像。

waterfall.desc_en: Status and results of any waterfall email/phone enrichment that was triggered.
waterfall.title_zh: 触发的邮箱/电话瀑布式补全的状态与结果。

run_waterfall_email.desc_en: Enable waterfall email enrichment for every record in the batch.
run_waterfall_email.title_zh: 为批次中每条记录启用邮箱瀑布式补全。

run_waterfall_phone.desc_en: Enable waterfall phone enrichment for every record in the batch.
run_waterfall_phone.title_zh: 为批次中每条记录启用电话瀑布式补全。

reveal_personal_emails.desc_en: Include personal emails for every record; may consume extra credits.
reveal_personal_emails.title_zh: 为每条记录包含个人邮箱；可能额外消耗额度。

reveal_phone_number.desc_en: Include all phone numbers for every record; requires webhook_url for asynchronous delivery.
reveal_phone_number.title_zh: 为每条记录包含所有电话；需 webhook_url 异步回传。

webhook_url.desc_en: Callback URL receiving revealed phone numbers; required when reveal_phone_number is enabled.
webhook_url.title_zh: 接收已揭示电话号码的回调地址；reveal_phone_number 启用时必填。

details.desc_en: Array of person records to enrich, one object per person, up to 10.
details.title_zh: 待丰富的人员记录数组，每人一个对象，最多 10 条。

status.desc_en: Overall processing status of the bulk request.
status.title_zh: 批量请求的整体处理状态。

error_code.desc_en: Error code when the request failed; absent on success.
error_code.title_zh: 失败时的错误码；成功时不返回。

error_message.desc_en: Human-readable error detail when the request failed.
error_message.title_zh: 失败时的可读错误说明。

total_requested_enrichments.desc_en: Number of enrichments requested in this call.
total_requested_enrichments.title_zh: 本次调用请求的丰富数量。

unique_enriched_records.desc_en: Number of distinct records that were successfully enriched.
unique_enriched_records.title_zh: 成功丰富的去重记录数。

missing_records.desc_en: Number of records that could not be matched.

credits_consumed.desc_en: Credits spent on this bulk enrichment.
credits_consumed.title_zh: 本次批量丰富消耗的额度。

matches.desc_en: Per-record enrichment results, aligned to the input order.
matches.title_zh: 逐条记录的丰富结果，与输入顺序对应。

waterfall.desc_en: Aggregate status of waterfall enrichment across the batch.
waterfall.title_zh: 整批瀑布式补全的汇总状态。

domain.desc_en: Web domain of the company to enrich, e.g. apollo.io.
domain.title_zh: 待丰富公司的主域名，例如 apollo.io。

domains[].desc_en: Company domains to enrich, up to 10 per call.
domains[].title_zh: 待丰富的公司域名，每次最多 10 个。

status.desc_en: Overall processing status of the bulk request.
status.title_zh: 批量请求的整体处理状态。

error_code.desc_en: Error code when the request failed; absent on success.
error_code.title_zh: 失败时的错误码；成功时不返回。

error_message.desc_en: Human-readable error detail when the request failed.
error_message.title_zh: 失败时的可读错误说明。

total_requested_domains.desc_en: Number of domains submitted in this call.
total_requested_domains.title_zh: 本次调用提交的域名数量。

unique_domains.desc_en: Number of distinct domains after deduplication.

unique_enriched_records.desc_en: Number of distinct companies successfully enriched.
unique_enriched_records.title_zh: 成功丰富的去重公司数。
